monitor_the_situation.title: Israeli Attacks Kill Over 4,300 in Lebanon Since March 2
— S4 · Humanitarian · Beirut, Lebanon · 6h ago. Death toll from Israeli attacks on Lebanon since March 2 rises to 4,303, according to official reports.
